zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Forrester Stephens於1400年出生在英國格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托時，他的父親John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede22歲，母親Margaret de Didbrok19歲。他於1419年與Mary Alice Shaw在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1442年在他的家鄉享年42歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Forrester Stephens于1400年出生在英国格盧斯特斯爾布里斯托时，他的父亲John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede22岁，母亲Margaret de Didbrok19岁。他于1419年与Mary Alice Shaw在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1442年在他的家乡享年42岁，埋葬在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Stephens
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Stevens
meanings: English (London), Flemish, Dutch, and North German: patronymic from the personal name Steven . The surname of Flemish origin is also found in the Walloon part of Belgium. In North America, the English form of the surname has also absorbed some like-sounding Jewish names and various other European cognates, e.g. Greek Stefanidis , Serbian Stevanović (see Stevanovic ), Slovenian and Slovak Štefanič (see Stefanic ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: Forrester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name from Middle English forester ‘officer in charge of a forest or lord's hunting ground’ (Old French forestier, Anglo-Norman forester). See Forrest .

variants.name: Forrest
meanings: Mainly U.S.: transferred use of the surname, in origin a local name for someone who lived in or by an enclosed wood, Old French forest.

variants.name: Forester
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester   (see   Forrest  ).

variants.name: Forrister
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Forrester  .

variants.name: Forster
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, an occupational name with at least four possible derivations: from Middle English foster ‘foster parent’, for(e)ster ‘forester’, fors(e)ter ‘shearer’, or fu(y)ster ‘saddle-tree maker’.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Forrester Stephens was born in 1400, in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, his father, John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede, was 22 and his mother, Margaret de Didbrok, was 19. He married Mary Alice Shaw in 1419, in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1442, in his hometown, at the age of 42, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Forrester Stephens est né en 1400, à Bristol, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, son père, John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Didbrok, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Mary Alice Shaw en 1419, à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé en 1442, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 42 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Forrester Stephens 1400 in Bristol, Gloucestershire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede 22 und seine Mutter Margaret de Didbrok 19. Er hat 1419 in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom Mary Alice Shaw geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb 1442 im Alter von 42 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forrester Stephens è nato il nel 1400 nel Bristol, Gloucestershire, England, il suo padre, John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Didbrok, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Mary Alice Shaw nel 1419, nel Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1442, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 42 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Forrester Stephensが1400年にイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアブリストルで生まれた時，父John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmedeは22歳，母Margaret de Didbrokは19歳であった。1419年にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアでMary Alice Shawと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1442年に故郷で42歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Forrester Stephens(이)가 1400년 영국 그루스스터실르 브리스톨에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Didbrok(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에서 Mary Alice Shaw(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1442년 그의 고향에서 42세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

mn.West Pennard, Somerset, England: West Pennard, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Forrester Stephens nasceu em 1400, em Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Didbrok, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Alice Shaw em 1419, em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1442, em sua cidade natal, com 42 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Forrester Stephens родился в 1400 г. в местности бристол, глоусестиршир, Англия, его отцу по имени John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Didbrok, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Alice Shaw в 1419 г. в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер в 1442 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 42 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Forrester Stephens nació en 1400, en Bristol, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Forrester Stephens 2nd Baron Stephens of Lewynesmede, tenía 22 años y su mamá, Margaret de Didbrok, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Mary Alice Shaw en 1419, en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1442, en su pueblo, a la edad de 42 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
